lineage.Process: AddField neighborhoods p_whiteTEST DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods p_blackTEST DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods p_ownTEST DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods p_vacantTEST DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #

CalculateField neighborhoods p_whiteTEST output VB "Dim output
Dim calc

If [White] = 0 Then
calc = 0
ElseIf [Population] = 0 Then
calc = 0
Else
calc = ( [White] / [Population] )*100
End If

If calc > 100 Then
output = 100
Else
output = calc
End If"

CalculateField neighborhoods p_blackTEST output VB "Dim output
Dim calc

If [Blk_AfAm] = 0 Then
calc = 0
ElseIf [Population] = 0 Then
calc = 0
Else
calc = ( [Blk_AfAm] / [Population] )*100
End If

If calc > 100 Then
output = 100
Else
output = calc
End If"

CalculateField neighborhoods p_ownTEST output VB "Dim output
Dim calc

If [Occ_Own] = 0 Then
calc = 0
ElseIf [Occupied] = 0 Then
calc = 0
Else
calc = ( [Occ_Own] / [Occupied] )*100
End If

If calc > 100 Then
output = 100
Else
output = calc
End If"

CalculateField neighborhoods p_vacantTEST output VB "Dim output
Dim calc

If [Vacant] = 0 Then
calc = 0
ElseIf [Housing] = 0 Then
calc = 0
Else
calc = ( [Vacant] / [Housing] )*100
End If

If calc > 100 Then
output = 100
Else
output = calc
End If"
JoinField neighborhoods FIRST_unique_HOLC HOLC_SecurityZones unique_HOLC Name;Security_L;Comments;Security_Z
AddField neighborhoods HOLC_Neigh TEXT # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods HOLC_Neigh TEXT # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods HOLC_MajNeigh TEXT # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods HOLC_unique TEXT # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods percHOLC_inNeigh DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
JoinField neighborhoods HOLC_unique HOLC_SecurityZones unique_HOLC Security_L;Comments;Security_Z
AddField neighborhoods HMT_ID TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods percHMT_inNiegh DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods HMT_grade TEXT # # 25 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods HMT_ID TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods percHMT_inNiegh DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods HMT_grade TEXT # # 25 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods HMT_ID TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods percHMT_inNiegh DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods HMT_grade TEXT # # 25 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods HMT_ID TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods percHMT_inNiegh DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods HMT_grade TEXT # # 25 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods HMT_ID TEXT # # 20 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods percHMT_inNiegh DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField neighborhoods HMT_grade TEXT # # 25 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #

FeatureClassToFeatureClass neighborhoods Z:\BES\git\neighborhoodDemographicChange BES_neighborhoodDemographicChange1930_2010.shp # "OBJECTID "OBJECTID" true true false 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,neighborhoods,OBJECTID,-1,-1;COLOR_2 "COLOR_2" true true false 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,neighborhoods,COLOR_2,-1,-1;Name "Name" true true false 80 Text 0 0 ,First,#,neighborhoods,Name,-1,-1;Population "Population" true true false 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,neighborhoods,Population,-1,-1;White "White" true true false 8 Double 0 0 attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
